meta.relationshipNote: Give time, Help girls in India to speak English With OneProsper Read & Rise.

assets.notes: Use placeholder images/videos/logos/icons everywhere until replaced.

lhs.h1: Give time, Help girls in India to speak English With OneProsper Read & Rise.
lhs.subhead: A 10 week prosocial program connecting high school girls in the United States with girls in India for weekly conversation and reading practice.
lhs.bridgeLine: Read and Rise is a sister organization to OneProsper International.

sections.title: Why conversation matters?
sections.intro: Many students learn English in school — but confidence grows through regular conversation.

cards.headline: Conversation practice is limited
cards.body: Students often don’t get enough speaking time to build comfort and fluency.

cards.headline: Confidence affects opportunity
cards.body: Speaking confidently can unlock participation, leadership, and future pathways.

cards.headline: Mentorship is powerful
cards.body: A consistent peer relationship helps students stay motivated and supported.

sections.title: OneProsper Read & Rise
sections.intro: Simple structure. Real impact. One weekly commitment.

cards.headline: Get paired with a learner
cards.body: You’ll be matched with a learner in India for a 10-week program.

cards.headline: Meet weekly for 30 minutes
cards.body: Use Zoom/Meet to practice conversational English and read together.

cards.headline: Follow a clear lesson plan
cards.body: We provide weekly materials so you always know what to do.

items.quote: I would highly recommend the program and hope that you enjoy it too!
It’s such an honor to be part of such a noble cause.
I have never been part of something that has had such a positive impact on someone’s life!
It was just a really rewarding feeling to watch them grow and become more confident in their English speaking skills.
items.attribution: Vani S., The Quarry Lane School

items.quote: It was really exciting to see how much they improved after the course of just a couple of lessons!
What I really think is special about this program is that it gave me, an ordinary high school student, an opportunity to connect with others online and share my knowledge through teaching.
What I really think is special about this program is that it gave me, an ordinary high school student, an opportunity to connect with others online and share my knowledge through teaching.
I learned English speaking, new words, new sentences and difficult words!
I am thankful to OneProsper for giving me a chance to learn and also to my Buddy.
I learned how to read hard words easily.
They teach us English in a very interesting way.
I have a lot more confidence in speaking English.
It was very good. I have improved my pronunciation and reading skills.
High impact, low lift for our school.
A structured program that builds leadership and service.

steps.title: Sign up
steps.body: Share your email to get started.

steps.title: Confirm your Availability
steps.body: Reply YES to the confirmation message.

cards.headline: Verified service hours
cards.body: Earn meaningful community service hours through a consistent weekly commitment.

cards.headline: Leadership + mentorship skills
cards.body: Build communication, responsibility, and confidence as a mentor.

cards.headline: Global perspective
cards.body: Connect across cultures and learn through real relationships.

sections.title: Why schools choose Read and Rise
sections.intro: Schools want programs that build leadership, service, and measurable impact without heavy admin overhead.

cards.headline: Students want meaningful service
cards.body: Students want service that builds real skills and responsibility.

cards.headline: Schools need structure
cards.body: Without a clear framework, volunteer programs lose momentum.

cards.headline: Outcomes must be measurable
cards.body: Schools benefit from trackable participation and completion.

sections.title: A structured program your students can lead
sections.intro: Clear expectations, guided materials, measurable results.

cards.headline: Share the signup link
cards.body: Promote the program and share dates with eligible students.

cards.headline: Support student participation
cards.body: Encourage orientation attendance and weekly consistency.

cards.headline: Celebrate service + leadership
cards.body: Recognize students for mentorship, global learning, and service hours.

cards.headline: Service hours + leadership development
cards.body: Students earn verified service hours while building mentorship skills.

cards.headline: A structured, low-lift program
cards.body: Clear schedule, guided materials, and a predictable process.

cards.headline: Mission-aligned global impact
cards.body: A meaningful way to connect students to global learning and equity.

joinUs.title: Join read & rise
joinUs.body: Enter your email to get started.

donateSection.title: Sponsor a learner
donateSection.body: Your donation helps cover learning materials, program operations, and school coordination—so every learner can participate.

footer.relationshipLine: Read and Rise is a sister organization to OneProsper International.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: We believe that every girl deserves access to quality education and the confidence to pursue her dreams. Through our innovative Buddy Program, we connect passionate high school students in the U.S. and Canada with eager learners in India, creating meaningful relationships that transform lives on both sides of the world.

services.title: 10-Week Buddy Program
services.description: A structured English learning program that pairs high school mentors with learners in India for weekly conversation and reading practice.

services.title: Educational Support
services.description: We provide comprehensive learning materials, lesson plans, and ongoing support to ensure both mentors and learners succeed.

services.title: Community Building
services.description: Fostering global connections and cultural understanding through meaningful peer relationships and shared learning experiences.

initiatives.title: School Partnerships
initiatives.description: We work directly with schools to integrate our program into their service learning curriculum, making it easy for students to participate.

initiatives.title: Learner Support
initiatives.description: Every learner receives personalized attention, regular check-ins, and resources to help them build confidence and improve their English skills.

howToHelp.title: How to Help
howToHelp.intro: Your support makes our mission possible. There are many ways to get involved and make a difference in the lives of learners around the world.

waysToHelp.title: Donate
waysToHelp.description: Your financial contribution helps us cover program costs, learning materials, and operational expenses. Every dollar makes a difference in providing quality education to learners who need it most.

waysToHelp.title: Volunteer as a Buddy
waysToHelp.description: Join our community of mentors and make a direct impact by becoming a Buddy. Spend 30 minutes each week helping a learner practice English and build confidence. No prior teaching experience required—we provide all the materials and support you need.

waysToHelp.title: Partner with Us
waysToHelp.description: Schools and organizations can partner with us to bring the Buddy Program to their students. We handle the logistics, matching, and support—you provide the students who want to make a difference.

testimonials.quote: This program changed my life. I went from being afraid to speak English to feeling confident in conversations. My Buddy was patient, kind, and always encouraging.
Being a Buddy was the most meaningful service I've done in high school. I learned so much about teaching, patience, and connecting across cultures.
Our students love this program. It's structured, impactful, and builds real leadership skills. We've seen incredible growth in both our mentors and the relationships they've built.

stories.title: Building Confidence, One Conversation at a Time
stories.body: When Anjali first joined our program, she was hesitant to speak during her weekly sessions. Through consistent support from her Buddy, Emma, she gradually opened up. By the end of the 10-week program, Anjali was confidently leading conversations and even helping other learners. Today, she's pursuing higher education with newfound confidence.

stories.title: A Friendship That Crosses Continents
stories.body: What started as a weekly English practice session became a genuine friendship between Maya, a high school student in California, and Riya, a learner in rural India. They continue to stay in touch, sharing life updates and supporting each other's goals. This is the kind of lasting impact we're proud to facilitate.

timeline.title: Program Launch
timeline.description: Started with 50 learners and 50 Buddies in our pilot program

timeline.title: Expansion
timeline.description: Grew to 500 participants and partnered with 20 schools

timeline.title: Recognition
timeline.description: Received recognition for educational innovation and community impact

timeline.title: Scale
timeline.description: Reached 2,000+ learners and expanded to 100+ partner schools

timeline.title: Milestone
timeline.description: Celebrated 5,000+ learners enrolled and 7,500+ volunteer hours

blogs.title: Blogs
blogs.intro: Stories, insights, and updates from our community

posts.title: The Power of Peer Mentorship in Education
posts.excerpt: Research shows that peer mentorship can significantly improve learning outcomes. In this post, we explore how our Buddy Program leverages this powerful educational tool.
posts.author: Dr. Jane Smith

posts.title: Celebrating Our 5,000th Learner
posts.excerpt: We're thrilled to announce that we've reached a major milestone: 5,000 learners have participated in our program. Read about the journey and what's next.
posts.author: Team OneProsper

posts.title: Building Cross-Cultural Connections
posts.excerpt: Our Buddies share their experiences connecting with learners across the globe and how these relationships have enriched their own lives.
posts.author: Student Contributors

sections.title: Mission
sections.body: Our mission is to empower women and girls in India to break the cycle of poverty through access to education, clean water, and life-changing opportunities. We focus on programs like Project Parivartan and the English Learning Buddy Program to provide resources and skills that create lasting change.

sections.title: Leadership Team
sections.body:
Our work is guided by our dedicated leadership team: 

- Raju Agarwal, Founder & CEO
- Emily Neapolitan, Director of English Learning Buddy Program
- Lily von Behren, Program Manager - English Learning Buddy Program

Together, they oversee our programs, ensuring every initiative aligns with our mission to empower women and girls in India.

sections.title: Directors & Advisors
sections.body:
OneProsper’s Board of Directors includes: 
- Raju Agarwal, Founder & CEO
- Ishan Gupta, Director
- Ved Sinha, Director

Our Advisory Board provides guidance and expertise: 
- Stephen Pratt, Advisor
- Pawan Deshpande, Advisor
- Anushka Joshi, Advisor

We are also grateful for our partners and volunteers, including GRAVIS and Photographers Without Borders, who support our programs in India.

sections.title: History
sections.body: OneProsper International was founded by Raju Agarwal in 2010 as a Canadian nonprofit, later establishing a U.S. 501(c)(3) organization. Originally focused on providing drip irrigation systems in India’s Thar Desert, Raju realized that girls were missing school to collect water. This insight inspired Project Parivartan in 2017 and the English Learning Buddy Program in 2018, both designed to provide education and skills to girls in need. Over the years, we have helped hundreds of girls access education and break the cycle of poverty.

sections.title: Relationship to OneProsper
sections.body: Read and Rise is a sister organization to OneProsper International, sharing the same vision of empowering women and girls through education and opportunities.

signup.body: Enter your email to get started.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.body: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. We may collect information such as your name, email address, and usage data to provide and improve our services. We do not share your information with third parties without your consent, except as required by law. You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. By using our website, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy. For questions or concerns, please contact us directly.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.body: Welcome to our website. By accessing or using our services, you agree to comply with these Terms of Service. You must be at least 18 years old or have parental consent to use our website. You agree not to misuse our services, including uploading harmful content or violating applicable laws. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access for any violation of these terms. All content on this website is owned by us or our partners, and may not be copied or redistributed without permission. By using our services, you accept these Terms of Service and any updates we may make. For questions or clarifications, please contact us directly.
